Name: Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to be performed after Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of the interval starting with Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and ending with the next occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed or SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include a successful reviewer agreement
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Reviewer Declined compared to time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total resolution time of the reviewer response phase initiated by Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2, measured until SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants leading to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-AE Recommendation overdue in cases where no SW-Reviewer Agreed follows within 14 days
Metric: the average of the function base > 14 where base is the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'

Name: Elapsed time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and the subsequent SW-AE Assign Reviewers when SW-Reviewer Agreed does not occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average waiting time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 until any definitive reviewer outcome (SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-Reviewer Agreed in high-complexity variants involving multiple prior reminders and editor reassignments
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that ultimately result in SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in traces where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs exactly once after the reminder
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Reviewer Agreed grouped by case:concept:name to assess per-manuscript responsiveness
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"
